subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Maryam 1
subcodes.first_line: O Mary! Mahdi arrived in Baghdad with one holy sword-hilt and one knife of Muhammad-'Ali, bearing tidings [3.5s]... ...What is causing thy sadness and why art thou sorrowful? Hast thou ever heard of the ocean shedding tears in separation from a river or the sun fearing the pursuit of a star?
subcodes.first_line_orig: مریما مهدی با یک قبضه صمدی و یک دکله محمد علی واصل و عاید بغداد شد مع خبرهای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @continual renewal of creation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
